title: Michael Sherwin
text: Home * People * Michael Sherwin Michael J. Sherwin , an American computer chess programmer, and stockbroker [1] . He is author of the WinBoard compatible chess engine RomiChess , which is famous for its learning approach [2] . Michael's interests in bitboards and methods to generate sliding piece attacks did result in his index based approach, coined by Harald Lüßen as Sherwin Bitboards , and more recently SISSY Bitboards , as applied in his new engine Bricabrac [3] .
